---
title: "Sensitivity Sub-Studies: INLA Approximation Strategy and Mesh Construction"
author: "Robyn Irawan"
date: "2026"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
```

```{r libraries}
# Load packages and create output folders
library(INLA)
library(sf)
library(spatstat)
library(spatstat.geom)
library(spatstat.random)
library(Matrix)
library(fields)

dir.create("outputs",             showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create("outputs/tables",      showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create("outputs/checkpoints", showWarnings = FALSE)

set.seed(888)

cat("INLA version:", as.character(packageVersion("INLA")), "\n")

save_csv <- function(df, filename) {
  write.csv(df, file.path("outputs", "tables", filename), row.names = FALSE)
}
```

```{r domain}
# Define synthetic spatial domain S = [0,10]^2
kanto_owin   <- owin(xrange = c(0, 10), yrange = c(0, 10))
kanto_coords <- rbind(c(0, 0), c(10, 0), c(10, 10), c(0, 10), c(0, 0))
kanto_sf     <- st_sf(geometry = st_sfc(st_polygon(list(kanto_coords))), crs = NA)
```

```{r reference_points}
# Habitat reference coordinate sets F_k (see Appendix A of the manuscript)
water_refs <- rbind(c(8.5, 4.0), c(9.0, 5.0), c(8.0, 6.0),
                    c(4.0, 0.5), c(3.5, 1.0), c(6.0, 1.5))
cave_refs  <- rbind(c(6.5, 5.5), c(8.5, 5.0),
                    c(4.0, 1.0), c(2.5, 3.0), c(5.5, 3.5))
grass_refs <- rbind(c(5.0, 3.5), c(5.0, 2.5), c(4.5, 6.5), c(7.0, 6.0))

interp_safe <- function(im_obj, x, y) {
  suppressWarnings(interp.im(im_obj, x = x, y = y, bilinear = TRUE))
}

dist_to_refs <- function(x, y, refs) {
  dmat <- outer(seq_along(x), seq_len(nrow(refs)), function(i, j)
    sqrt((x[i] - refs[j, 1])^2 + (y[i] - refs[j, 2])^2))
  apply(dmat, 1, min)
}

# Terrain-distance covariate images, standardised to zero mean, unit variance
res_grid <- 100
xg <- seq(0, 10, length.out = res_grid)
yg <- seq(0, 10, length.out = res_grid)
cg <- expand.grid(x = xg, y = yg)

im_w <- im(matrix(dist_to_refs(cg$x, cg$y, water_refs), nrow = res_grid, byrow = FALSE),
          xcol = xg, yrow = yg)
im_c <- im(matrix(dist_to_refs(cg$x, cg$y, cave_refs), nrow = res_grid, byrow = FALSE),
          xcol = xg, yrow = yg)
im_g <- im(matrix(dist_to_refs(cg$x, cg$y, grass_refs), nrow = res_grid, byrow = FALSE),
          xcol = xg, yrow = yg)

raw_w <- mapply(function(x, y) interp_safe(im_w, x, y), cg$x, cg$y)
raw_c <- mapply(function(x, y) interp_safe(im_c, x, y), cg$x, cg$y)
raw_g <- mapply(function(x, y) interp_safe(im_g, x, y), cg$x, cg$y)
mean_w <- mean(raw_w); sd_w <- sd(raw_w)
mean_c <- mean(raw_c); sd_c <- sd(raw_c)
mean_g <- mean(raw_g); sd_g <- sd(raw_g)

make_im_std <- function(refs, win, mu, sdv) {
  res <- 100
  xg <- seq(win$xrange[1], win$xrange[2], length.out = res)
  yg <- seq(win$yrange[1], win$yrange[2], length.out = res)
  cg <- expand.grid(x = xg, y = yg)
  raw <- dist_to_refs(cg$x, cg$y, refs)
  mat <- matrix((raw - mu) / sdv, nrow = res, byrow = FALSE)
  im(mat, xcol = xg, yrow = yg)
}

im_w_std <- make_im_std(water_refs, kanto_owin, mean_w, sd_w)
im_c_std <- make_im_std(cave_refs,  kanto_owin, mean_c, sd_c)
im_g_std <- make_im_std(grass_refs, kanto_owin, mean_g, sd_g)
```

```{r true_params}
# True DGP parameters and Matern GRF simulator (nu = 1)
TRUE_PARAMS <- list(
  water = list(alpha0 =  0.0, alpha1 = -1.5, range = 2.0, sigma = 0.8),
  cave  = list(alpha0 = -0.7, alpha1 = -2.0, range = 1.5, sigma = 1.0),
  grass = list(alpha0 = -0.5, alpha1 = -1.2, range = 2.5, sigma = 0.7)
)

simulate_matern_grf <- function(range_true, sigma_true, win, res = 50, seed_val) {
  set.seed(seed_val)
  xg    <- seq(win$xrange[1], win$xrange[2], length.out = res)
  yg    <- seq(win$yrange[1], win$yrange[2], length.out = res)
  cg    <- expand.grid(x = xg, y = yg)
  kappa <- sqrt(8) / range_true
  D     <- as.matrix(dist(cg[, 1:2]))
  kh    <- kappa * D + 1e-8
  Sigma <- sigma_true^2 * kh * besselK(kh, nu = 1)
  diag(Sigma) <- sigma_true^2
  Sigma <- Sigma + diag(1e-6, res^2)
  L  <- chol(Sigma)
  xi <- as.numeric(t(L) %*% rnorm(res^2))
  im(matrix(xi, nrow = res, ncol = res, byrow = FALSE), xcol = xg, yrow = yg)
}
```

```{r std_mesh}
# Standard mesh (matches the main pipeline exactly)
build_mesh <- function(max_edge, offset_vec, cutoff_val, bnd_segment) {
  inla.mesh.2d(boundary = bnd_segment, max.edge = max_edge,
              offset = offset_vec, cutoff = cutoff_val)
}

bnd <- inla.mesh.segment(kanto_coords[-5, ])

mesh_std <- build_mesh(max_edge = c(0.35, 1.0), offset_vec = c(0.5, 1.8),
                       cutoff_val = 0.18, bnd_segment = bnd)
cat("Standard mesh:", mesh_std$n, "nodes,", nrow(mesh_std$graph$tv), "triangles\n")
```

```{r voronoi_helper}
# Voronoi dual-mesh integration weights (Simpson et al. 2016)
book.mesh.dual <- function(mesh) {
  tv <- mesh$graph$tv
  ce <- t(sapply(seq_len(nrow(tv)), function(i)
    colMeans(mesh$loc[tv[i, ], 1:2])))
  pls <- lapply(seq_len(mesh$n), function(i) {
    p <- unique(Reduce("rbind", lapply(1:3, function(k) {
      j <- which(tv[, k] == i)
      if (length(j) == 0) return(NULL)
      rbind(ce[j, , drop = FALSE],
            0.5 * (mesh$loc[tv[j, k], 1:2] +
                   mesh$loc[tv[j, setdiff(1:3, k)[1]], 1:2]),
            0.5 * (mesh$loc[tv[j, k], 1:2] +
                   mesh$loc[tv[j, setdiff(1:3, k)[2]], 1:2]))
    })))
    j1 <- which(mesh$segm$bnd$idx[, 1] == i)
    j2 <- which(mesh$segm$bnd$idx[, 2] == i)
    if (length(j1) > 0)
      p <- unique(rbind(p,
        0.5 * (mesh$loc[mesh$segm$bnd$idx[j1, 1], 1:2] +
               mesh$loc[mesh$segm$bnd$idx[j1, 2], 1:2]),
        0.5 * (mesh$loc[mesh$segm$bnd$idx[j2, 1], 1:2] +
               mesh$loc[mesh$segm$bnd$idx[j2, 2], 1:2])))
    p <- p[chull(p), ]
    sp::Polygon(rbind(p, p[1, ]))
  })
  sp::SpatialPolygons(lapply(seq_along(pls), function(i)
    sp::Polygons(list(pls[[i]]), i)))
}

compute_w_vec <- function(mesh) {
  dmesh    <- book.mesh.dual(mesh)
  dmesh_sf <- st_as_sf(dmesh)
  kanto_v  <- st_make_valid(kanto_sf)
  w <- numeric(mesh$n)
  for (i in seq_len(mesh$n)) {
    tryCatch({
      cell  <- st_make_valid(dmesh_sf[i, ])
      inter <- st_intersection(cell, kanto_v)
      w[i]  <- if (nrow(inter) > 0) as.numeric(st_area(inter)) else 0
    }, error = function(e) { w[i] <<- 0 })
  }
  w
}

w_vec_std <- compute_w_vec(mesh_std)
cat("Standard mesh: total weight =", round(sum(w_vec_std), 2),
    " | active =", sum(w_vec_std > 0), "\n")

spde_std <- inla.spde2.pcmatern(mesh = mesh_std, alpha = 2,
                                prior.range = c(2.0, 0.50),
                                prior.sigma = c(1.0, 0.50))
```

```{r fit_function}
# Generic LGCP fitter with configurable INLA strategy and mesh
fit_lgcp <- function(ppp_obj, dist_im, mesh, spde, w_vec,
                     strategy = "laplace", int_strategy = "eb") {
  n_obs  <- npoints(ppp_obj)
  n_mesh <- mesh$n

  cov_obs  <- interp_safe(dist_im, ppp_obj$x, ppp_obj$y)
  cov_mesh <- interp_safe(dist_im, mesh$loc[, 1], mesh$loc[, 2])

  A_obs <- inla.spde.make.A(mesh = mesh, loc = cbind(ppp_obj$x, ppp_obj$y))
  A_int <- Diagonal(n = n_mesh)

  stk_obs <- inla.stack(
    data    = list(y = rep(1L, n_obs), E = rep(0, n_obs)),
    A       = list(A_obs, 1),
    effects = list(s = seq_len(spde$n.spde),
                   data.frame(intercept = 1, dist_cov = cov_obs)),
    tag = "obs")
  stk_int <- inla.stack(
    data    = list(y = rep(0L, n_mesh), E = w_vec),
    A       = list(A_int, 1),
    effects = list(s = seq_len(spde$n.spde),
                   data.frame(intercept = 1, dist_cov = cov_mesh)),
    tag = "int")
  stk_all <- inla.stack(stk_obs, stk_int)

  t0  <- proc.time()
  fit <- tryCatch(
    inla(y ~ -1 + intercept + dist_cov + f(s, model = spde),
        family  = "poisson",
        data    = inla.stack.data(stk_all),
        E       = inla.stack.data(stk_all)$E,
        control.predictor = list(A = inla.stack.A(stk_all),
                                 compute = FALSE, link = 1),
        control.compute   = list(dic = FALSE, waic = FALSE,
                                 cpo = FALSE, config = FALSE),
        control.inla      = list(strategy = strategy, int.strategy = int_strategy),
        verbose = FALSE),
    error = function(e) NULL)
  elapsed <- as.numeric((proc.time() - t0)["elapsed"])

  if (is.null(fit)) {
    return(list(beta1_mean = NA, beta1_sd = NA, beta1_lo = NA, beta1_hi = NA,
               range_mean = NA, range_lo = NA, range_hi = NA,
               sigma_mean = NA, sigma_lo = NA, sigma_hi = NA, elapsed = elapsed))
  }

  fx  <- fit$summary.fixed
  spr <- tryCatch(inla.spde2.result(fit, "s", spde, do.transform = TRUE),
                   error = function(e) NULL)

  if (is.null(spr)) {
    return(list(beta1_mean = fx["dist_cov", "mean"], beta1_sd = fx["dist_cov", "sd"],
               beta1_lo = fx["dist_cov", "0.025quant"], beta1_hi = fx["dist_cov", "0.975quant"],
               range_mean = NA, range_lo = NA, range_hi = NA,
               sigma_mean = NA, sigma_lo = NA, sigma_hi = NA, elapsed = elapsed))
  }

  rm  <- spr$marginals.range.nominal[[1]]
  sm  <- spr$marginals.variance.nominal[[1]]
  rci <- tryCatch(inla.hpdmarginal(0.95, rm), error = function(e) matrix(c(NA, NA), nrow = 1))
  sci <- tryCatch(inla.hpdmarginal(0.95, sm), error = function(e) matrix(c(NA, NA), nrow = 1))

  list(
    beta1_mean = fx["dist_cov", "mean"], beta1_sd = fx["dist_cov", "sd"],
    beta1_lo   = fx["dist_cov", "0.025quant"], beta1_hi = fx["dist_cov", "0.975quant"],
    range_mean = inla.emarginal(function(x) x, rm),
    range_lo   = rci[1, 1], range_hi = rci[1, 2],
    sigma_mean = sqrt(max(0, inla.emarginal(function(x) x, sm))),
    sigma_lo   = sqrt(max(0, sci[1, 1])), sigma_hi = sqrt(max(0, sci[1, 2])),
    elapsed    = elapsed
  )
}
```

```{r strategy_config}
# Sub-study 1: four INLA approximation configurations, Water guild
STRATEGY_CONFIGS <- list(
  list(label = "Gaussian",                strategy = "gaussian",           int_strategy = "eb"),
  list(label = "Simplified Laplace",      strategy = "simplified.laplace", int_strategy = "eb"),
  list(label = "Full Laplace, eb (main)", strategy = "laplace",            int_strategy = "eb"),
  list(label = "Full Laplace, grid",      strategy = "laplace",            int_strategy = "grid")
)
N_SUB_1 <- 100
```

```{r strategy_loop}
# Loop: one Water pattern per replicate, refit under all four configurations
t_start_1 <- proc.time()
sub1_rows <- list()

for (rep in seq_len(N_SUB_1)) {

  grf_w_r <- simulate_matern_grf(TRUE_PARAMS$water$range, TRUE_PARAMS$water$sigma,
                                  kanto_owin, seed_val = 30000 + rep)

  set.seed(40000 + rep)
  water_r <- rpoispp(
    lambda = function(x, y)
      pmax(0, exp(TRUE_PARAMS$water$alpha0
                 + TRUE_PARAMS$water$alpha1 * interp_safe(im_w_std, x, y)
                 + interp_safe(grf_w_r, x, y))),
    win = kanto_owin)
  n_enc <- npoints(water_r)

  if (n_enc < 5) { cat("Rep", rep, "skipped: too few encounters\n"); next }

  for (cfg in STRATEGY_CONFIGS) {
    r <- fit_lgcp(water_r, im_w_std, mesh_std, spde_std, w_vec_std,
                 strategy = cfg$strategy, int_strategy = cfg$int_strategy)

    sub1_rows[[length(sub1_rows) + 1]] <- data.frame(
      rep = rep, config = cfg$label, strategy = cfg$strategy,
      int_strat = cfg$int_strategy, n_enc = n_enc, elapsed = r$elapsed,
      beta1_mean = r$beta1_mean, beta1_sd = r$beta1_sd,
      beta1_lo = r$beta1_lo, beta1_hi = r$beta1_hi,
      range_mean = r$range_mean, range_lo = r$range_lo, range_hi = r$range_hi,
      sigma_mean = r$sigma_mean, sigma_lo = r$sigma_lo, sigma_hi = r$sigma_hi,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  }

  if (rep %% 10 == 0) {
    checkpoint_df <- do.call(rbind, sub1_rows)
    save(checkpoint_df, file = file.path("outputs", "checkpoints",
                                         paste0("substudy1_checkpoint_rep", rep, ".RData")))
    cat("Rep", rep, "/", N_SUB_1, "checkpoint saved\n")
  }
}

cat("Sub-study 1 wall time:",
    round(as.numeric((proc.time() - t_start_1)["elapsed"]) / 60, 1), "min\n")

sub1_df <- do.call(rbind, sub1_rows)
save_csv(sub1_df, "14_substudy1_approxstrat_water_by_replicate.csv")
```

```{r strategy_aggregate}
# Aggregate Sub-study 1 with Monte Carlo standard errors
TRUE_B1_W  <- TRUE_PARAMS$water$alpha1
TRUE_RHO_W <- TRUE_PARAMS$water$range

mc_se_prop <- function(p, n) round(100 * sqrt(p * (1 - p) / n), 2)

agg_config <- function(df, cfg_label) {
  s <- df[df$config == cfg_label, ]
  n <- sum(!is.na(s$beta1_mean))

  b1_cov  <- mean(s$beta1_lo <= TRUE_B1_W & s$beta1_hi >= TRUE_B1_W, na.rm = TRUE)
  rho_cov <- mean(s$range_lo <= TRUE_RHO_W & s$range_hi >= TRUE_RHO_W, na.rm = TRUE)

  data.frame(
    config = cfg_label, N_valid = n,
    beta1_coverage_pct  = round(100 * b1_cov, 1),
    beta1_coverage_MCSE = mc_se_prop(b1_cov, n),
    beta1_bias = round(mean(s$beta1_mean - TRUE_B1_W, na.rm = TRUE), 4),
    beta1_RMSE = round(sqrt(mean((s$beta1_mean - TRUE_B1_W)^2, na.rm = TRUE)), 4),
    beta1_CI_width = round(mean(s$beta1_hi - s$beta1_lo, na.rm = TRUE), 4),
    range_coverage_pct  = round(100 * rho_cov, 1),
    range_coverage_MCSE = mc_se_prop(rho_cov, n),
    range_bias = round(mean(s$range_mean - TRUE_RHO_W, na.rm = TRUE), 4),
    range_RMSE = round(sqrt(mean((s$range_mean - TRUE_RHO_W)^2, na.rm = TRUE)), 4),
    range_CI_width = round(mean(s$range_hi - s$range_lo, na.rm = TRUE), 4),
    mean_elapsed_sec = round(mean(s$elapsed, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
}

sub1_summary <- do.call(rbind, lapply(sapply(STRATEGY_CONFIGS, function(c) c$label),
                                      agg_config, df = sub1_df))
rownames(sub1_summary) <- NULL
save_csv(sub1_summary, "15_substudy1_approxstrat_summary_with_mcse.csv")
print(sub1_summary)
```

```{r mesh_build}
# Sub-study 2: three mesh configurations, Cave guild
mesh_coarse <- build_mesh(max_edge = c(0.70, 2.0), offset_vec = c(0.5, 1.8),
                          cutoff_val = 0.35, bnd_segment = bnd)
mesh_fine   <- build_mesh(max_edge = c(0.20, 0.60), offset_vec = c(1.0, 2.5),
                          cutoff_val = 0.10, bnd_segment = bnd)

cat("Coarse mesh:", mesh_coarse$n, "nodes,", nrow(mesh_coarse$graph$tv), "triangles\n")
cat("Fine mesh:  ", mesh_fine$n,   "nodes,", nrow(mesh_fine$graph$tv), "triangles\n")

w_vec_coarse <- compute_w_vec(mesh_coarse)
w_vec_fine   <- compute_w_vec(mesh_fine)

spde_coarse <- inla.spde2.pcmatern(mesh = mesh_coarse, alpha = 2,
                                   prior.range = c(2.0, 0.50), prior.sigma = c(1.0, 0.50))
spde_fine   <- inla.spde2.pcmatern(mesh = mesh_fine, alpha = 2,
                                   prior.range = c(2.0, 0.50), prior.sigma = c(1.0, 0.50))

MESH_CONFIGS <- list(
  list(label = "Coarse",                   mesh = mesh_coarse, spde = spde_coarse, w_vec = w_vec_coarse),
  list(label = "Standard (main study)",     mesh = mesh_std,    spde = spde_std,    w_vec = w_vec_std),
  list(label = "Fine + extended boundary",  mesh = mesh_fine,   spde = spde_fine,   w_vec = w_vec_fine)
)

mesh_meta <- data.frame(
  config = c("Coarse", "Standard", "Fine + extended boundary"),
  total_nodes  = c(mesh_coarse$n, mesh_std$n, mesh_fine$n),
  active_nodes = c(sum(w_vec_coarse > 0), sum(w_vec_std > 0), sum(w_vec_fine > 0)),
  total_triangles = c(nrow(mesh_coarse$graph$tv), nrow(mesh_std$graph$tv), nrow(mesh_fine$graph$tv))
)
save_csv(mesh_meta, "16_substudy2_mesh_configurations.csv")
print(mesh_meta)
```

```{r mesh_loop}
# Loop: one Cave pattern per replicate, refit under all three meshes
N_SUB_2 <- 100
t_start_2 <- proc.time()
sub2_rows <- list()

for (rep in seq_len(N_SUB_2)) {

  grf_c_r <- simulate_matern_grf(TRUE_PARAMS$cave$range, TRUE_PARAMS$cave$sigma,
                                  kanto_owin, seed_val = 50000 + rep)

  set.seed(60000 + rep)
  cave_r <- rpoispp(
    lambda = function(x, y)
      pmax(0, exp(TRUE_PARAMS$cave$alpha0
                 + TRUE_PARAMS$cave$alpha1 * interp_safe(im_c_std, x, y)
                 + interp_safe(grf_c_r, x, y))),
    win = kanto_owin)
  n_enc <- npoints(cave_r)

  if (n_enc < 5) { cat("Rep", rep, "skipped: too few encounters\n"); next }

  for (mcfg in MESH_CONFIGS) {
    r <- fit_lgcp(cave_r, im_c_std, mcfg$mesh, mcfg$spde, mcfg$w_vec,
                 strategy = "laplace", int_strategy = "eb")

    sub2_rows[[length(sub2_rows) + 1]] <- data.frame(
      rep = rep, mesh_cfg = mcfg$label, mesh_n = mcfg$mesh$n,
      n_enc = n_enc, elapsed = r$elapsed,
      beta1_mean = r$beta1_mean, beta1_sd = r$beta1_sd,
      beta1_lo = r$beta1_lo, beta1_hi = r$beta1_hi,
      range_mean = r$range_mean, range_lo = r$range_lo, range_hi = r$range_hi,
      sigma_mean = r$sigma_mean, sigma_lo = r$sigma_lo, sigma_hi = r$sigma_hi,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  }

  if (rep %% 10 == 0) {
    checkpoint_df <- do.call(rbind, sub2_rows)
    save(checkpoint_df, file = file.path("outputs", "checkpoints",
                                         paste0("substudy2_checkpoint_rep", rep, ".RData")))
    cat("Rep", rep, "/", N_SUB_2, "checkpoint saved\n")
  }
}

cat("Sub-study 2 wall time:",
    round(as.numeric((proc.time() - t_start_2)["elapsed"]) / 60, 1), "min\n")

sub2_df <- do.call(rbind, sub2_rows)
save_csv(sub2_df, "17_substudy2_meshsens_cave_by_replicate.csv")
```

```{r mesh_aggregate}
# Aggregate Sub-study 2 with Monte Carlo standard errors
TRUE_B1_C  <- TRUE_PARAMS$cave$alpha1
TRUE_RHO_C <- TRUE_PARAMS$cave$range

agg_mesh <- function(df, cfg_label) {
  s <- df[df$mesh_cfg == cfg_label, ]
  n <- sum(!is.na(s$beta1_mean))

  b1_cov  <- mean(s$beta1_lo <= TRUE_B1_C & s$beta1_hi >= TRUE_B1_C, na.rm = TRUE)
  rho_cov <- mean(s$range_lo <= TRUE_RHO_C & s$range_hi >= TRUE_RHO_C, na.rm = TRUE)

  data.frame(
    mesh_cfg = cfg_label, mesh_n = unique(s$mesh_n), N_valid = n,
    beta1_coverage_pct  = round(100 * b1_cov, 1),
    beta1_coverage_MCSE = mc_se_prop(b1_cov, n),
    beta1_bias = round(mean(s$beta1_mean - TRUE_B1_C, na.rm = TRUE), 4),
    beta1_RMSE = round(sqrt(mean((s$beta1_mean - TRUE_B1_C)^2, na.rm = TRUE)), 4),
    range_coverage_pct  = round(100 * rho_cov, 1),
    range_coverage_MCSE = mc_se_prop(rho_cov, n),
    range_bias = round(mean(s$range_mean - TRUE_RHO_C, na.rm = TRUE), 4),
    range_RMSE = round(sqrt(mean((s$range_mean - TRUE_RHO_C)^2, na.rm = TRUE)), 4),
    mean_elapsed_sec = round(mean(s$elapsed, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
}

sub2_summary <- do.call(rbind, lapply(sapply(MESH_CONFIGS, function(c) c$label),
                                      agg_mesh, df = sub2_df))
rownames(sub2_summary) <- NULL
save_csv(sub2_summary, "18_substudy2_meshsens_summary_with_mcse.csv")
print(sub2_summary)
```

```{r final_summary}
# Console summary and metadata
meta <- data.frame(
  quantity = c("Sub-study 1: N replicates", "Sub-study 1: configurations",
              "Sub-study 2: N replicates", "Sub-study 2: mesh configurations",
              "Session date"),
  value = c(N_SUB_1, length(STRATEGY_CONFIGS), N_SUB_2, length(MESH_CONFIGS),
           format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"))
)
save_csv(meta, "19_substudies_metadata.csv")
print(meta)

save(sub1_df, sub1_summary, sub2_df, sub2_summary, mesh_meta, meta,
     N_SUB_1, N_SUB_2, STRATEGY_CONFIGS, MESH_CONFIGS,
     file = "outputs/substudies_FINAL.RData")

cat("\nTables -> outputs/tables/\n")
cat("End:", format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"), "\n")
```
